name: Txn Bank
description_short: TXN Bank of Central Texas is a regional FDIC-insured bank serving Central Texas communities with branch locations, ATMs, Interactive Teller Machines, and digital banking services.
description_long:
TXN Bank of Central Texas operates as a community-focused FDIC-insured bank headquartered in the Central Texas region. The bank emphasizes local service with multiple branch locations across towns including Hondo, Castroville, Lytle, La Coste, D'Hanis, Bandera, Leakey, and Uvalde. As an FDIC-insured institution, customer deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

TXN Bank offers both personal and business banking services, including checking and savings accounts, online banking, mobile banking, and cash management solutions. The bank has modernized its service delivery through Interactive Teller Machines (ITMs)—branded as "Breeze Banking"—which combine ATM functionality with video-conferenced teller services. Customers can access accounts through TXN Mobile Banking app, manage balances, pay bills, transfer money, and locate nearby ATMs and banking centers. The bank also provides investment products through partnerships with Ameriprise Financial Services.

TXN Bank distinguishes itself through extended drive-thru hours across multiple locations and a commitment to modernized banking technology via Breeze Banking ITMs. The bank actively communicates fraud prevention measures to customers, including warnings about phone scams and security updates like one-time passcodes for online banking. The bank targets various customer segments, including college students with specialized account programs.

As a regional community bank, TXN Bank serves a limited geographic area of Central Texas. The website provides limited detailed information about specific account types, fees, interest rates, or minimum balance requirements. Customers in areas outside their branch network may find access and service limitations compared to national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Interactive Teller Machine (ITM) services via Breeze Banking
Debit card services with fraud protection
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Extended drive-thru hours across 8 locations including newly added Uvalde
Interactive Teller Machine (ITM) technology combining ATM and video teller services
Free TXN Mobile Banking app for account management and ATM location finding
Proactive fraud prevention communication and security updates (one-time passcodes)
Both personal and business banking services available
College student-specific banking programs and support
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Central Texas region
Website lacks transparency on specific account types, fees, and APY rates
Interactive Teller Machines not available at all locations, limited to some branches
No information about minimum balance requirements or account features
Limited online account opening capability (website states "coming soon")
best_for: Central Texas residents seeking community banking with local branch relationships
College students in service areas looking for student-focused banking programs
Small business owners needing business banking and cash management services
Customers preferring in-person service through drive-thru or branch locations
diagnosis: TXN Bank is best for residents of Central Texas communities seeking traditional community banking with modern technology conveniences like mobile banking and video teller machines. The primary caveat is the limited geographic service area—customers outside Central Texas cannot access this bank, and even within the region, not all locations have full service offerings or ITM technology.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: TXN Bank of Central Texas is an FDIC-insured bank serving Central Texas with branch locations, ATMs, and digital banking services.
